visa_types.name: Others
visa_types.documents_required:
- Complete visa application form
- Current original passport with a minimum validity of 6 months from the date of application
There must be one blank page for visa issuance.
- Photocopy of passport bio page
- One facial photo (3.5 x 4.5 cm) meeting the requirement (please see the ‘Photo Specifications’ page.)
- Permission letter issued by Immigration or Embassy of Mongolia
- Photocopy of flight itinerary
- Photocopy of proof of accommodation (i.e. hotel reservation with applicant name)
In case of staying at a private house, submit a copy of the house owner’s resident card (both front and back side) and fill out the address on the application form.
- Original receipt of bank transfer for visa fee and centre service fee
visa_types.visa_fees:
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1k2DQbBIz0hQtmvQ24etR1/06bcd82a36ac2e49233b6607712575ad/visa-fee-table.pdf) to find visa fee.
In addition to visa fee, applicants are required to pay service fee (KRW 5,000 for Regular, KRW 20,000 for Express) to the centre.
Please remit the total fee (visa fee + service fee) to the following bank account:
Name of Bank: Busan Bank
Bank Accoung Number: 113-2012-3934-07
Account Holder Name: 브이에프에스코리아 (VFS South Korea)
Payment receipt must be submitted to the centre in Busan along with your application.
For Postal Submission, please include courier service fee (KRW 19,000 per application) .
Please be noted that personal / company cheques, mobile / phone banking receipts, ATM receipts or cash would not be accepted. Additional  services (#) that
                                                                        are provided at the centre can be paid in cash at the centre.
Note: All fees will be not refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.
visa_types.processing_time:
Applications with Express service submitted until 11:30 will be processed on the same day of submission and the passport can be collected between 16:00 and 17:00 (only for Express applications)
                                                                        on the same day. For non-Korean nationals, please contact us if express service will be applicable. 
For applications with regular service, the visa processing will take about 3 to 5 working days.
visa_types.forms:
[Table:Others]
Please click above, download the form and fill out the form.
Mongolia visa application centre offers Form filling service with additional cost for applicant’s convenience. Please click here (#) to check our additional
                                                                        services.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Who can Apply?
- Nationals to visit or reside in the country upon invitation by religious organizations irrespective to his/her passport type (‘SH’ Visa Level)
- Nationals who have been issued the permission to immigrate to Mongolia (‘TS’ Visa Level)
- Permission for visa will be denied due to the reasons below and you can reapply after 30 days of the decision made.
- Purpose of visiting Mongolia is not specified
- Incomplete visa application form
- Supporting documents for visa issuance are insufficient
- Fales information/ document in the application
- For non-Korean nationals, please
contact us (#)
prior to visiting our centre to confirm the visa requirements and the visa fee.

## Visa Fees
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1k2DQbBIz0hQtmvQ24etR1/06bcd82a36ac2e49233b6607712575ad/visa-fee-table.pdf) to find visa fee.
In addition to visa fee, applicants are required to pay service fee (KRW 5,000 for Regular, KRW 20,000 for Express) to the centre.
Please remit the total fee (visa fee + service fee) to the following bank account:
Name of Bank: Busan Bank
Bank Accoung Number: 113-2012-3934-07
Account Holder Name: 브이에프에스코리아 (VFS South Korea)
Payment receipt must be submitted to the centre in Busan along with your application.
For Postal Submission, please include courier service fee (KRW 19,000 per application) .
Please be noted that personal / company cheques, mobile / phone banking receipts, ATM receipts or cash would not be accepted. Additional  services (#) that
                                                                        are provided at the centre can be paid in cash at the centre.
Note: All fees will be not refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.

## Documents Required
- Complete visa application form
- Current original passport with a minimum validity of 6 months from the date of application
There must be one blank page for visa issuance.
- Photocopy of passport bio page
- One facial photo (3.5 x 4.5 cm) meeting the requirement (please see the ‘Photo Specifications’ page.)
- Permission letter issued by Immigration or Embassy of Mongolia
- Photocopy of flight itinerary
- Photocopy of proof of accommodation (i.e. hotel reservation with applicant name)
In case of staying at a private house, submit a copy of the house owner’s resident card (both front and back side) and fill out the address on the application form.
- Original receipt of bank transfer for visa fee and centre service fee

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
- Size 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm
- Use coloured photo with light background.
- The photo must be no more than 6 months old.
- Taken without headgear
- Head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant’s face.
Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
Applications with Express service submitted until 11:30 will be processed on the same day of submission and the passport can be collected between 16:00 and 17:00 (only for Express applications)
                                                                        on the same day. For non-Korean nationals, please contact us if express service will be applicable. 
For applications with regular service, the visa processing will take about 3 to 5 working days. 

## Download Forms

[Table:Others]
Please click above, download the form and fill out the form.
Mongolia visa application centre offers Form filling service with additional cost for applicant’s convenience. Please click here (#) to check our additional
                                                                        services.

## Overview

## Who can Apply?
- Family members of residents of Mongolia for private purpose and foreign nationals visiting the country for private purpose irrespective to his/her passport
- Permission for visa will be denied due to the reasons below and you can reapply after 30 days of the decision made.
- Purpose of visiting Mongolia is not specified
- Incomplete visa application form
- Supporting documents for visa issuance are insufficient
- Fales information/ document in the application
- For non-Korean nationals, please
contact us (#)
prior to visiting our centre to confirm the visa requirements and the visa fee.

## Visa Fees
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1k2DQbBIz0hQtmvQ24etR1/06bcd82a36ac2e49233b6607712575ad/visa-fee-table.pdf) to find visa fee.
In addition to visa fee, applicants are required to pay service fee (KRW 5,000 for Regular, KRW 20,000 for Express) to the centre.
Please remit the total fee (visa fee + service fee) to the following bank account:
Name of Bank: Busan Bank
Bank Accoung Number: 113-2012-3934-07
Account Holder Name: 브이에프에스코리아 (VFS South Korea)
Payment receipt must be submitted to the centre in Busan along with your application.
For Postal Submission, please include courier service fee (KRW 19,000 per application) .
Please be noted that personal / company cheques, mobile / phone banking receipts, ATM receipts or cash would not be accepted. Additional  services (#) that
                                                                        are provided at the centre can be paid in cash at the centre.
Note: All fees will be not refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.

## Documents Required
- Complete visa application form
- Current original passport with a minimum validity of 6 months from the date of application
There must be one blank page for visa issuance.
- Photocopy of passport bio page
- One facial photo (3.5 x 4.5 cm) meeting the requirement (please see the ‘Photo Specifications’ page.)
- Permission letter issued by Immigration or Embassy of Mongolia
- Photocopy of flight itinerary
- Photocopy of proof of accommodation (i.e. hotel reservation with applicant name)
In case of staying at a private house, submit a copy of the house owner’s resident card (both front and back side) and fill out the address on the application form.
- Original receipt of bank transfer for visa fee and centre service fee

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
- Size 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm
- Use coloured photo with light background.
- The photo must be no more than 6 months old.
- Taken without headgear

                                                                        on the same day. For non-Korean nationals, please contact us if express service will be applicable. 
For applications with regular service, the visa processing will take about 3 to 5 working days. 

## Download Forms

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Who can Apply?
- A Transit Visa is granted for the sole purpose of enabling the holder to travel through Mongolia to reach his/her ultimate destination. Change of purpose is not allowed.
- A transit visa is non-extendable and non-convertible.
- To check the list of visa exemption countries, please
click here (http://www.mongolembassy.com/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=106&Itemid=220&lang=mn)
.
- Permission for visa will be denied due to the reasons below and you can reapply after 30 days of the decision made.
- Purpose of visiting Mongolia is not specified
- Incomplete visa application form
- Supporting documents for visa issuance are insufficient
- Fales information/ document in the application

## Visa Fees
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1k2DQbBIz0hQtmvQ24etR1/06bcd82a36ac2e49233b6607712575ad/visa-fee-table.pdf) to find visa fee.
In addition to visa fee, applicants are required to pay service fee (KRW 5,000 for Regular, KRW 20,000 for Express) to the centre.
Please remit the total fee (visa fee + service fee) to the following bank account:
Name of Bank: Busan Bank
Bank Accoung Number: 113-2012-3934-07
Account Holder Name: 브이에프에스코리아 (VFS South Korea)
Payment receipt must be submitted to the centre in Busan along with your application.
For Postal Submission, please include courier service fee (KRW 19,000 per application) .
Please be noted that personal / company cheques, mobile / phone banking receipts, ATM receipts or cash would not be accepted. Additional  services (#) that
                                                                        are provided at the centre can be paid in cash at the centre.
Note:
All fees will not be refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.
All fees will not be refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.

## Documents Required
- Complete visa application form
- Current original passport with a minimum validity of 6 months from the date of application
There must be one blank page for visa issuance.
- Photocopy of passport bio page
- One facial photo (3.5 x 4.5 cm) meeting the requirement (please see the ‘Photo Specifications’ page.)
- Photocopy of flight itinerary
- Photocopy of proof of accommodation (i.e. hotel reservation with applicant name)
- In case of staying at a private house, submit a copy of the house owner’s resident card (both front and back side) and fill out the address on the application form.
- Original receipt of bank transfer for visa fee and centre service fee

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
- Size 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm
- Use coloured photo with light background.
- The photo must be no more than 6 months old.
- Taken without headgear
- Head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant’s face.
Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
Applications with Express service submitted until 11:30 will be processed on the same day of submission and the passport can be collected between 16:00 and 17:00 (only for Express applications)on
                                                                        the same day. For non-Korean nationals, please contact us if express service will be applicable. 
For applications with regular service, the visa processing will take about 3 to 5 working days. 

## Download Forms

                                                                        services.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Who can Apply?
- Official passport holders, who visiting and residing on official purposes
- Ordinary passport holders, who visiting on official business of international organizations and their family members
- Nationals, who hold official and ordinary passports and intend to visit Mongolia at the invitation of State, central administrative and local self-governing bodies of Mongolia or
                                                                            a political party having seats at the State Ih Hural (Parliament of Mongolia)
- Nationals, who hold official and ordinary passports and intend to work in Mongolia according to inter-governmental agreement and treaties
- Employee of foreign or international press who hold official and ordinary passports
- Permission for visa will be denied due to the reasons below and you can reapply after 30 days of the decision made.
- Purpose of visiting Mongolia is not specified
- Incomplete visa application form
- Supporting documents for visa issuance are insufficient
- Fales information/ document in the application
- For non-Korean nationals, please
contact us (#)
prior to visiting our centre to confirm the visa requirements and the visa fee.

## Visa Fees
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1k2DQbBIz0hQtmvQ24etR1/06bcd82a36ac2e49233b6607712575ad/visa-fee-table.pdf) to find visa fee.
In addition to visa fee, applicants are required to pay service fee (KRW 5,000 for Regular, KRW 20,000 for Express) to the centre.
Please remit the total fee (visa fee + service fee) to the following bank account:
Name of Bank: Busan Bank
Bank Accoung Number: 113-2012-3934-07
Account Holder Name: 브이에프에스코리아 (VFS South Korea)
Payment receipt must be submitted to the centre in Busan along with your application.
For Postal Submission, please include courier service fee (KRW 19,000 per application) .
Please be noted that personal / company cheques, mobile / phone banking receipts, ATM receipts or cash would not be accepted. Additional  services (#) that
                                                                        are provided at the centre can be paid in cash at the centre.
Note: All fees will be not refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.

## Documents Required
- Complete visa application form
- Current original passport with a minimum validity of 6 months from the date of application
There must be one blank page for visa issuance.
- Photocopy of passport bio page
- One facial photo (3.5 x 4.5 cm) meeting the requirement (please see the ‘Photo Specifications’ page.)
- Permission letter issued by Immigration or Embassy of Mongolia
- Photocopy of flight itinerary
- Photocopy of proof of accommodation (i.e. hotel reservation with applicant name)
In case of staying at a private house, submit a copy of the house owner’s resident card (both front and back side) and fill out the address on the application form.
- Original receipt of bank transfer for visa fee and centre service fee

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
- Size 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm
- Use coloured photo with light background.
- The photo must be no more than 6 months old.
- Taken without headgear
- Head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant’s face.
Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
Applications with Express service submitted until 11:30 will be processed on the same day of submission and the passport can be collected between 16:00 and 17:00 (only for Express applications)
                                                                        on the same day. For non-Korean nationals, please contact us if express service will be applicable. 
For applications with regular service, the visa processing will take about 3 to 5 working days. 

## Download Forms

[Table:Official]
Please click above, download the form and fill out the form.
Mongolia visa application centre offers Form filling service with additional cost for applicant’s convenience. Please click here (#) to check our additional
                                                                        services.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Who can Apply?
- A tourist visa can be granted to a foreigner who does not have a residence or occupation in Mongolia and whose sole objective of visiting Mongolia is recreation, sightseeing, casual
                                                                            visit to meet friends, etc. No other activity is permissible on a tourist visa including business meetings. Those who are going to Mongolia for business meetings should apply
                                                                            for a Business Visa.
- A tourist visa is non-extendable and non-convertible.
- To check the list of visa exemption countries, please
click here (http://www.mongolembassy.com/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=106&Itemid=220&lang=mn)
.
- Permission for visa will be denied due to the reasons below and you can reaaply after 30 days of the decision made.
- Purpose of visiting Mongolia is not specified
- Visa Application Form is not submitted
- Incomplete visa application form
- Fales information/ document in the application

## Visa Fees
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1k2DQbBIz0hQtmvQ24etR1/06bcd82a36ac2e49233b6607712575ad/visa-fee-table.pdf) to find visa fee.

                                                                        are provided at the centre can be paid in cash at the centre.
Note:
All fees will not be refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.
All fees will not be refundable once the application is submitted at the centre.

## Documents Required
- Complete visa application form

There must be blank page for visa issuance.

- Photocopy of flight itineary

## Photo Specifications
